mapper.select:
SELECT A.CNSG_REQS_ID , A.REQS_INTT_ID , D.ETNM AS REQS_INTT_NM , A.CNSG_PTRN_CD , B.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_PTRN_NM , A.CNSG_REQS_TTL , A.CNSG_STTS_CD , C.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_STTS_NM
, A.CNSG_RPLY_CON , A.RPLY_MNGR_ID , A.RPLY_TS , A.RGSN_USER_ID , A.RGSN_TS , A.AMNN_USER_ID , A.AMNN_TS
, A.RGSN_USER_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_CNSG_REQS_M A LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D B ON (A.CNSG_PTRN_CD = B.COM_CD_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON (A.CNSG_STTS_CD = C.COM_CD_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M D ON (A.REQS_INTT_ID = D.UTLINSTT_ID) WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(CNSG_REQS_TTL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' OR UPPER(CNSG_REQS_CON) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(A.RGSN_USER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchUser}) || '%'
ORDER BY A.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT A.CNSG_REQS_ID , A.REQS_INTT_ID , D.ETNM AS REQS_INTT_NM , A.CNSG_PTRN_CD , B.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_PTRN_NM , A.CNSG_REQS_TTL , A.CNSG_REQS_CON , A.CNSG_STTS_CD , C.COM_CD_NM AS CNSG_STTS_NM
, A.CNSG_RPLY_CON , A.RPLY_MNGR_ID , A.RPLY_TS , A.RGSN_USER_ID , A.RGSN_TS , A.AMNN_USER_ID , A.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_CNSG_REQS_M A LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D B ON (A.CNSG_PTRN_CD = B.COM_CD_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON (A.CNSG_STTS_CD = C.COM_CD_ID) LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M D ON (A.REQS_INTT_ID = D.UTLINSTT_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND CNSG_REQS_ID = #{cnsgReqsId}
